name: Tulsa Fire Department Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion together and pour off any excess grease.
2. Add chili powder, cumin, salt, crushed garlic, beef broth, and tomato sauce to the pot.
3. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes on low heat.
5. Stir in the pinto beans and continue to cook for an additional 15 minutes.
6. To thicken the chili slightly, mix a small amount of flour with water (1 tablespoon flour dissolved in 1/4 cup water).
7. Serve the chili over cooked spaghetti or enjoy it plain alongside some crackers.
